residents_comments: Carl Patterson wished everyone a Happy New Year and thanked the staff of Attick Towers for their work.
Resident council president Chauncey Taylor mentioned the Christmas and New Year festivities.
Ms. Keeler acknowledged the efforts of the residents with decluttering, and noted that it produced positive mental health.
executive_directors_report: Michelle Johnson was recognized in the Hear and Now article.
Michelle Johnson mentioned the mayor and council meeting on January 21, 2025,  and the approval of Betty Jones for the position of Resident Commissioner.
The proposal submitted by GEMM COMM for the opportunity to assist Attick Towers in optimizing their energy use and generate renewable power.
decisions: Approve the financial reports for December 31, 2024, as submitted.
Approve the re-approved regular monthly meeting minutes for December 19, 2024, as amended.
Approve the executive session meeting minutes held on December 19, 2024, as submitted.
